title: A refuse collector and compactor system
abstract: A refuse collector and compactor system with a top opening bin (1) and a refuse collector and compactor device (10) that comprises a housing to accommodate the bin and a compactor mechanism (40) arranged within the housing. The mechanism comprises a press element (41) and a motorized actuator adapted to impart to the press element a pressing motion from an upper retracted position to a lower pressing position wherein the press element is introduced into the top opening bin (1) so as to compact refuse that has been deposited in the bin via a refuse insertion opening (7) of the housing. The device is provided with at least one refuse retaining member (30,31). The bin is provided, in a bin side wall (4,5) thereof, with an introduction opening (11) for the at least one refuse retaining member (30,31). The system is embodied so that the refuse retaining member enters into the refuse collection space via the introduction opening (11) in order to arrive at an operable location within the refuse collection. The refuse retaining member (30,31) is configured to counteract an expansion of refuse that has been compacted by the compactor mechanism (41).
claims:
Claims C L A I M S 1 . A refuse collector and compactor system comprising: - a top opening bin (1) comprising a bin bottom, one or more bin side walls (3, 4, 5, 6), and a bin top opening (7), defining a refuse collection space of the bin, - a refuse collector and compactor device (10) comprising: - a frame structure (27,28), - a bin reception space which is accessible in a lateral direction (arrow A) to allow for removal of the bin from the bin reception space and placing the bin (1) in the bin reception space in said lateral direction, - a compactor mechanism (40) mounted to the frame structure and comprising: - a press element (41), - a motorized actuator (42) adapted to impart to the press element (41) a pressing motion from an upper retracted position to a lower pressing position wherein the press element is introduced via the bin top opening (7) into the top opening bin (1 ) that has been placed in the bin reception space so as to compact refuse that has been deposited in the bin, and adapted to impart to the press element a return motion from said lower pressing position to said upper retracted position so as to clear the top opening bin, e.g. for continued depositing of refuse into the bin, characterized in that the refuse collector and compactor device (10) is provided with at least one refuse retaining member (30,31), and in that the top opening bin (1) is provided, in a bin side wall (4,5) thereof, with an introduction opening (1 1) for said at least one refuse retaining member (30,31), wherein the system is embodied so that the at least one refuse retaining member (30,31) enters into said refuse collection space of the bin (1) via the introduction opening (1 1) for said at least one refuse retaining member in order to arrive at an operable location of said at least one refuse retaining member within said refuse collection space of the bin, wherein the at least one refuse retaining member (30,31) is configured to counteract an expansion of refuse that has been compacted by means of the compactor mechanism. 2. System according to claim 1 , wherein the system further comprises a refuse collection bag that is configured to be arranged within the top opening bin (1) as a liner so that refuse is collected in the refuse collection bag, wherein, with the refuse collection bag lining the bin accommodated in the bin reception space, the at least one refuse retaining member in its operable location within the refuse collection space of the bin is to the outside of the refuse collection bag. 3. System according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the at least one refuse retaining member (30,31) and the introduction opening (1 1) in a side wall (4,5) of the top opening bin (7) for said at least one refuse retaining member are embodied such that, upon laterally (arrow A) placing the bin in the bin reception space the refuse retaining member enters into said refuse collection space of the bin via the introduction opening for said at least one refuse retaining member to arrive at the operable location within said refuse collection space of the bin. 4. System according to any one of claims 1 - 3, wherein the at least one refuse retaining member (30,31) is stationary mounted. 5. System according to any one of claims 1 - 4, wherein the at least one refuse retaining member (30,31) is a stationary member, that is stationary mounted. 6. System according to any one of claims 1 - 5, wherein the device comprises two refuse retaining members (30,31) mounted at locations that are spaced from one another, and wherein the bin (7) comprises two introduction openings (1 1), each in a respective side wall (4,5) of a pair of opposed side walls of the top opening bin (1) and each configured to receive a respective one of the two refuse retaining members, such that, upon laterally placing the bin in the bin reception space each refuse retaining member (30,31 ) enters into the refuse collection space of the bin (1) via the corresponding introduction opening (1 1) for said refuse retaining member to arrive at the operable location within said refuse collection space of the bin. 7. System according to any one of claims 1 - 6, wherein an introduction opening (1 1) in a side wall of the bin for said at least one refuse retaining member is embodied as a horizontally arranged slot (1 1), e.g. in said side wall extending in said lateral direction of placing the bin in the bin reception space. 8. System according to any one of claims 1 - 7, wherein the device comprises a housing (20) configured to accommodate the top opening bin (1) in said bin reception space located within said housing, said housing having a top (21) and a bottom end, wherein the housing has a refuse insertion opening (26) and a bin handling opening that is configured to allow for removal of the bin from the housing and placing the bin in the housing in said lateral direction, preferably the housing comprising a door (26) configured to close said bin handling opening, for example wherein the housing is configured to be arranged on a surface (50), e.g. on the ground at a public location. 9. System according to any one of claims 1 - 8, wherein the bin (1 ) is a wheeled bin, e.g. having two wheels (8) arranged on an axis, and/or wherein the bin has a cover (9) configured to close the top opening of the bin, and/or wherein the bin has a refuse collection space with a volume between 80 and 250 litres, e.g. of 120 litres. 10. System according to claim 8, wherein the housing is provided with a lid (26a), e.g. a tiltable lid, e.g. operable by hand and/or by a foot pedal (26b), configured to close the refuse insertion opening (26). 1 1 . System according to any one of the claims 1 - 10, wherein the frame structure comprises a left hand and a right hand upright frame member (27,28) spaced from one another to receive the bin (1) between them, wherein each of the left hand and right hand upright frame members is provided with a respective refuse retaining member (30,31 ), and wherein the bin comprises two introduction openings (1 1 ), each in a respective side wall of a pair of opposed side walls of the top opening bin and each configured to receive a respective one of the two refuse retaining members, such that, upon laterally placing the bin in the bin reception space between the left hand and right hand upright frame members each refuse retaining member enters into the refuse collection space of the bin via the corresponding introduction opening for said retaining member to arrive at the operable location within said refuse collection space of the bin. 12. System according to claim 1 1 , wherein the compactor mechanism (40) is secured to top portions of the left and right upright frame members (27,28). 13. System according to any one of claims 1 - 12, wherein the device has a floor (29) onto which the bin is to be placed, e.g. in the embodiment of claim 1 1 the floor being connected to the left hand and right hand upright frame members (27,28). 14. A refuse collector and compactor device (10) comprising: - a frame structure (27,28), - a bin reception space configured to accommodate a top opening bin (1) therein, said top opening bin (1) comprising a bin bottom, one or more bin side walls (3, 4, 5, 6), and a bin top opening (7), defining a refuse collection space of the bin, wherein the top opening bin (1) is provided, in a bin side wall (4,5) thereof, with an introduction opening (1 1) for at least one refuse retaining member (30,31), wherein the bin reception space is accessible in a lateral direction to allow for removal of the bin from the bin reception space and placing the bin in the bin reception space in said lateral direction, - a compactor mechanism (40) mounted to the frame structure and comprising: - a press element (41), - a motorized actuator (42) adapted to impart to the press element (41) a pressing motion from an upper retracted position to a lower pressing position wherein the press element is introduced via the bin top opening (7) into the top opening bin (1) that is placed in the bin reception space so as to compact refuse that has been deposited in the bin, and adapted to impart to the press element a return motion from said lower pressing position to said upper retracted position so as to clear the top opening bin, e.g. for continued depositing of refuse into the bin, 

 wherein the refuse collector and compactor device (10) is provided with at least one refuse retaining member (30,31), embodied so that the at least one refuse retaining member enters into said refuse collection space of the bin via the introduction opening in said bin side wall (4,5) for said at least one refuse retaining member (30,31) in order to arrive at an operable location of said at least one refuse retaining member within said refuse collection space of the bin, wherein the at least one refuse retaining member is configured to counteract an expansion of refuse that has been compacted by means of the compactor mechanism. 15. A refuse collector and compactor device according to claim 14, wherein the device comprises a housing (20) configured to accommodate the top opening bin (1) in said bin reception space located within said housing, said housing having a top (21) and a bottom end, wherein the housing has a refuse insertion opening (26) and a bin handling opening that is configured to allow for removal of the bin from the housing and placing the bin in the housing in said lateral direction, preferably the housing comprising a door (26) configured to close said bin handling opening, for example wherein the housing is configured to be arranged on a surface (50), e.g. on the ground at a public location. 16. A top opening bin (1) configured to be placed in a housing of a refuse collector and compactor device (10), said device comprising: - a frame structure, - a bin reception space which is accessible in a lateral direction to allow for removal of the bin from the bin reception space and placing the bin in the bin reception space in said lateral direction, - a compactor mechanism (40) mounted to the frame structure and comprising: - a press element (41), - a motorized actuator (42) adapted to impart to the press element (41) a pressing motion from an upper retracted position to a lower pressing position wherein the press element is introduced via the bin top opening (7) into the top opening bin (1) that has been placed in the bin reception space so as to compact refuse that has been deposited in the bin, and adapted to impart to the press element a return motion from said lower pressing position to said upper retracted position so as to clear the top opening bin, e.g. for continued depositing of refuse into the bin, characterized in that the refuse collector and compactor device (10) is provided with at least one refuse retaining member (30,31), and in that the top opening bin (1) is provided, in a bin side wall thereof, with an introduction opening (1 1 ) for said at least one refuse retaining member (30,31), wherein the system is embodied so that the at least one refuse retaining member enters into said refuse collection space of the bin via the introduction opening for said at least one refuse retaining member in order to arrive at an operable location of said at least one refuse retaining member within said refuse collection space of the bin, 

 wherein the at least one refuse retaining member is configured to counteract an expansion of refuse that has been compacted by means of the compactor mechanism. 17. A method for collecting and compacting refuse, wherein use is made of a refuse collector and compactor system, refuse collector and compactor device, and/or top opening bin according to any of the preceding claims.
